# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest main branch and the most recent release are currently receiving security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Vivant parses third-party EPUB files, which can contain HTML/JS. Security is critical.

If you find a vulnerability (e.g., XSS, path traversal, memory unsafety), **do not open a public issue.**

Instead, email franklin.nolasco.dev@gmail.com directly. Include:

1. Description of the vulnerability.
2. Steps to reproduce.
3. Example malicious EPUB file (if applicable).

We will respond within 3 days.
